# Vantage

> Vantage is the all-in-one field service management platform for quoting, dispatch, scheduling, invoicing, and automated growth.

Vantage helps field service businesses manage customers, schedule and dispatch jobs, build quotes and estimates, track timesheets, and run radius marketing campaigns — all in one place.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Weekly revenue, pending invoices, and today's scheduled jobs.
- [Customers](/customers): Manage your customer records and history.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Track and dispatch field service jobs.
- [Calendar](/calendar): Schedule and view upcoming work.
- [Estimates](/estimates): Build and send job estimates.
- [Quotes](/quotes): Manage quotes and pricing presets.
- [Campaigns](/campaigns): Run radius marketing outreach.
- [Ledger](/ledger): Review financials and invoicing.
- [Team](/team): Manage crew members and assignments.
- [Timesheets](/timesheets): Track crew hours.

## Optional

- [AI Hub](/ai-hub): Chat with Van, the AI assistant.
- [Settings](/settings): Account and workspace configuration.
